summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
summary.en: Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、提示词与任务引导、copilot 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project 相关功能、knowledge 相关功能、skills 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

address grain timer callback lifecycle token相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了address grain timer callback lifecycle token相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 分布式会话运行时、qoder 相关功能、opencode 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

prevent model override since Kimi ACP lacks set_model support相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了prevent model override since Kimi ACP lacks set_model support相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 kimi 相关功能、providers 相关功能、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Model

  • Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, prompt and task guidance, Copilot.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects Project, Knowledge, Skills.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to address grain timer callback lifecycle token.
  • Impact: Affects distributed session runtime, Qoder, Kimi.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to prevent model override since Kimi ACP lacks set_model support.
  • Impact: Affects Kimi, Providers, Hagicode Core.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.
